_comment: Canonical finding shape consumed by the VS Code extension, CI action, and web UI.
title: Hardcoded API Secret
description: A secret or credential appears to be hardcoded directly in source code. Hardcoded secrets are permanently exposed once committed, even if later removed, because version control history preserves every change.
remediation: Move the secret to an environment variable. Rotate the exposed credential immediately — treat it as compromised.

fix.description: Replace hardcoded secret with process.env lookup
